translations.en: a gentleman of slight build and refined manners.
translations.zh: 一位身材清瘦、舉止優雅的紳士。

translations.en: "Greetings! I am Lord Antonio. Might I ask thy name?"
translations.zh: 「您好！在下乃安東尼奧大人。敢問汝尊名？」

translations.en: "Then prithee, what is it?"
translations.zh: 「那麼，尊名為何？」

translations.en: "As you wish."
translations.zh: 「悉聽尊便。」

translations.en: "The pleasure is all mine."
translations.zh: 「幸會，榮幸之至。」

translations.en: "Greetings, $P! What brings thee here this $T?"
translations.zh: 「歡迎，$P！$T有何貴幹？」

translations.en: "My name is Antonio."
translations.zh: 「在下名叫安東尼奧。」

translations.en: "I govern @New Magincia."
translations.zh: 「在下治理@New（新馬）精西亞。」

translations.en: *"Fortunately the fine people of this town have few disputes to settle, leaving me plenty of time for my @hobby."
translations.zh: *「幸而此鎮良善之民鮮少有爭端需要裁決，使在下有大把閒暇投入我的@hobby（嗜好）。」

translations.en: "The city of @humility is a lovely place to live."
translations.zh: 「@humility（謙遜）之城是個宜居的好地方。」

translations.en: "I do @magic tricks. It brings a bit of cheer into this imperfect world."
translations.zh: 「在下表演@magic（魔法），為這不完美的世界帶來一絲歡笑。」

translations.en: "The most @humble one amongst us knows the mantra."
translations.zh: 「吾等之中最@humble（謙遜）者方知真言。」

translations.en: "If thou canst find out who that is, tell me, and I will give thee the rune."*
translations.zh: 「若汝能查明此人是誰，告知在下，在下便將符文賜予汝。」*

translations.en: "Until we meet again, may your road be short and your fortunes long."
translations.zh: 「後會有期，願汝路途短而福運長。」

translations.en: "I cannot help thee with that."
translations.zh: 「此事在下愛莫能助。」

translations.en: "Wouldst thou like to see one?"
translations.zh: 「汝可有意看一場？」

translations.en: "As you wish."
translations.zh: 「悉聽尊便。」

translations.en: "Splendid!" Antonio reaches into his pocket and takes out a balloon.
translations.zh: 「妙極！」安東尼奧伸手入口袋，取出一個氣球。

translations.en: He blows it up until it bursts, and four doves appear from inside it, flying off towards the four points of the compass.*
translations.zh: 他將氣球吹至爆裂，四隻白鴿從中飛出，分朝四方而去。*

translations.en: "Did you enjoy that?"
translations.zh: 「汝可覺有趣？」

translations.en: "Too bad. Perhaps I should learn a better trick."
translations.zh: 「可惜，或許在下應學一個更好的把戲。」

translations.en: "I knew you would. That's my favorite trick!"
translations.zh: 「在下就知道汝會喜歡，那是在下最拿手的把戲！」

translations.en: "Dost thou know who is the most humble person in this town?"
translations.zh: 「汝可知此鎮最謙遜之人是誰？」

translations.en: "Keep asking around."
translations.zh: 「繼續四處詢問吧。」

translations.en: "Then what is that person's name?"
translations.zh: 「那此人名叫什麼？」

translations.en: "Very astute of thee! Here is the rune, and I wish thee success on thy mission."
translations.zh: 「汝果然敏銳！符文奉上，願汝任務告捷。」

translations.en: "'Tis not fitting that thou shouldst guess."
translations.zh: 「汝不應猜測，此舉有失妥當。」

translations.en: "Make sure thou dost know the answer before you speak with me again."
translations.zh: 「確認答案後再來找在下。」

translator_notes: 092 Antonio: 新馬精西亞的紳士領主，愛好魔術表演。符文謎題：找出最謙遜之人。
